name: Assessment Invitation
response:
Dear {{ applicant_name }},
You have been invited to complete an assessment as part of your application.
Please use the link below. It is personal to you and can be submitted only once.
The link is valid until {{ expiry_date }}.
Start Assessment
If the button does not work, copy this link into your browser:{{ link }}
Good luck!
